settings.headline: Thousands stay stocked and save with a TrueFit subscription.
settings.meta: Rated 4.8 out of 5 across verified reviews.

settings.question: How much do I save with a subscription?
settings.answer: You save 30% on your first subscription order and 15% on every order after, plus free shipping on every delivery within the US.

settings.question: How do I subscribe?
settings.answer: On any eligible product page, choose the Subscribe & Save option, pick your delivery frequency, and check out. We take care of the rest.

settings.question: Can I change how often it ships?
settings.answer: Yes. Choose a 30, 45, or 60 day schedule at checkout, then customize it to any frequency from your account anytime.

settings.question: Can I skip, pause, or cancel?
settings.answer: Anytime, with no fees. Manage everything from Manage Your Subscriptions in your account in a couple of taps.
